description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed bowl with a low profile and a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance. The exterior surface is matte and rough, with visible textural variations and subtle discolorations, suggesting it is made from unglazed ceramic or clay. The opening is large relative to the overall height, and the rim is thick and uneven, further emphasizing its artisanal quality. The color is a muted, earthy gray-brown, with some lighter and darker patches that add to its rustic look. The interior appears dark and unglazed, consistent with traditional utilitarian pottery. There are no visible handles, decorations, or additional features on the surface.
description: A rustic, round, wide-mouthed clay bowl with a rough, matte gray-brown surface and an unadorned, hand-crafted appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, circular opening and thick rim, with the dark interior visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the bowl's low profile, rounded body, and subtle surface texture.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the bowl's squat, bulbous shape and the absence of any decorative features.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the same rough, matte surface and the large opening.
attribute_location: kitchen or outdoor communal cooking area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, water, or ingredients
